signingKey.title: Signing key
signingKey.noKey: No key stored. Upload the <pem>.pem</pem> file from Enable Banking to enable sync.

proxy.title: CORS Proxy
proxy.description: All Enable Banking API calls are routed through this proxy. Deploy the worker with <wrangler>wrangler deploy</wrangler>.
proxy.warning: Note! Lommin's shared proxy forwards your traffic to Enable Banking and could in theory read your transaction data and your short-lived access token (but never the signing key). Lommin stores none of your data, but you simply have to trust that. If you don't, you can register your own proxy here.

sync.title: Sync
sync.description: How far back the first sync of an account fetches transactions. Subsequent syncs continue from where the last one stopped.

backup.title: Save and restore
backup.description: Back up your data encrypted. The password never leaves your device.
backup.notAvailableWithPassword: Not available when password is enabled.
backup.dialogSaveHint: Optional: protect the file with a password. Leave blank to save without encryption.
backup.dialogLoadHint: Enter the password you used when saving, or leave blank.

duplicates.title: Duplicate check
duplicates.description: Scan transactions for potential duplicates — same account, same amount within 1 day.

ownImport.title: Import from your own data
ownImport.comingSoon: Coming soon. Here you'll be able to import transactions from your own CSV files and other sources.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.confirmDeleteTransactions: Delete all saved transactions? Accounts remain connected; the next sync will re-fetch them.
danger.confirmDeleteAccounts: Delete all accounts and their transactions? This cannot be undone.
danger.wipeAllBody: This permanently deletes the signing key, all accounts, and all transactions. You will be taken back to the initial setup. This action cannot be undone.

snackbar.txDeleted: Transactions deleted. Run Sync on the overview to re-fetch.
snackbar.encryptedFile: File is encrypted with a password. Check "Use password" and try again.
